summary: Great show captured with a decent recording
review: Reviewers describe the concert as a great performance and thank the recorder, Jerry Moore. The audio is noted only as “decent,” indicating it is listenable though no detailed technical comments are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the show and mentions a decent recording; limited data prevents higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a decent recording; no specific comments on source type, clarity or mix issues.
